sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101508" key="susfairi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συσφαιρ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n101508.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">play at ball together</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.94a</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:6:32:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.32.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
